markdown:
#  RFIs (Android) 
Table of Contents 
##  Permissions 
Learn which user permissions are required to take the described actions in this tool. 
#####  Important
Some actions that impact this tool are done in other Procore tools. 
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take the action with this permission level.
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take this action with this permission level AND one or more additional requirements, like [granular permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-permissions-in-procore-and-how-do-they-work). 
[What granular permissions are available for the project's RFIs tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-granular-permissions-are-available-for-the-projects-rfis-tool)  
| Add a Related Item to an RFI   |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| Add Assignees to an RFI   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | 'Standard' level users must first be designated as an '**Assignee** ' and must be the current '**Ball In Court** ' person.  |  
| Bulk Edit RFIs  
 |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Change the Status of an RFI  
 |   |  ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)
  * Act as RFI Manager

 |  ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)
  * Act as RFI Manager

 | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |  Users with the '[Act as RFI Manager](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-rfi-manager-role)' granular permission must also have one of the following attributes:
  * Be assigned as the 'RFI Manager' on the RFI
  * Be the RFI's creator

 |  
| Choose an 'Official Response' for an RFI  
 |   |  ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)
  * Act as RFI Manager

OR
  * Mark Official Responses

 |  ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)
  * Act as RFI Manager

OR
  * Mark Official Responses

 | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | 
  * Users with the '[Act as RFI Manager](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-rfi-manager-role)' granular permission must also have one of the following attributes:
    * Be assigned as the 'RFI Manager' on the RFI
    * Be the RFI's creator
  * Users with the Mark Official Responses' granular permisison must also have one of the following attributes:
    * Be the RFI's creator
    * Be an Assignee
    * Be Distribution List Member

 |  
| Close an RFI   |   |  ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)
  * Act as RFI Manager

 |  ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)
  * Act as RFI Manager

 | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | 
  * Users with the '[Act as RFI Manager](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-rfi-manager-role)' granular permission must also have one of the following attributes:
    * Be assigned as the 'RFI Manager' on the RFI
    * Be the RFI's creator

 |  
| Configure Settings: RFIs   |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Create a Change Event from an RFI   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users also need 'Standard' level permissions or higher on the project's **Change Events** tool.  |  
| Create a Potential Change Order from an RFI   |   |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |  To create a Potential Change Order from an RFI, the following must also be true:
  * The RFI is created.
  * The prime contract must be in the 'Approved' status.
  * The Change Events tool must be disabled on the project, and the Prime Contracts tool must be configured for two (2) or three (3) tier change orders.
    * If the Change Events tool is enabled, follow the steps in [Create a Change Event from an RFI](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/create-a-change-event-from-an-rfi) instead.

 |  
| Create an Instruction from an RFI   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users must also have 'Standard' level permissions or higher on the project's **Instructions** tool.  |  
| Create a Draft RFI

  * Act as RFI Manager

 |  ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)
  * Act as RFI Manager

  * Act as RFI Manager

 |  ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)

  * Assigned as the 'RFI Manager' on the RFI

 |  
| Respond to an RFI   
 |   |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users with 'Standard' level permissions without a granular permission must also be an **Assignee** or a **Distribution List** member for the RFI.  |  
| Respond to an RFI   
 |   |  ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)
  * Act as RFI Manager

 |  ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)
  * Act as RFI Manager

  * 'Read Only' users with the granular permission must also be assigned as the 'RFI Manager' on the RFI
  * 'Standard' users with the granular permission must also have one of the following attributes:
    * Be assigned as the 'RFI Manager' on the RFI
    * Be the RFI's creator
    * Be an Assignee
    * Be a Distribution List Member

title: Permissions
description: This page lists the user permissions that are required to perform actions in or related to the project's RFIs tool on the Procore Android app.
